Description: IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTIONS  THE INTERIOR BUSINESS CENTER (IBC) HAS AN ONGOING NEED FOR AN INDUSTRY PARTNER TO ASSIST IN PROVIDING SUPPORT TO CURRENT AND POTENTIAL CLIENT AGENCIES OF THE ORACLE FEDERAL FINANCIALS FINANCIAL ACCOUNTING SYSTEM (HEREAFTER REFERRED TO AS OFF) DURING THE PENDING BREAK IN SERVICE BETWEEN THE EXPIRATION OF THE CURRENT IDIQ WITH APG, THE FOLLOW-ON SMALL BUSINESS SET-ASIDE COMPETITION AND THE RESULTING OFF IMPLEMENTATION CAPTURES PREVIOUSLY SUPPORTED BY THE INCUMBENT, APG . IGF::OT::IGF  THE E-COMMERCE OPERATIONAL SYSTEMS SUPPORT (EOSS) CONTRACT WILL ACQUIRE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (IT) SUPPORT SERVICES TO PERFORM SUSTAINMENT ENGINEERING, ENHANCEMENT ENGINEERING, AND ENGINEERING MANAGEMENT OF THE TRICARE MANAGEMENT ACTIVITY (TMA) E-COMMERCE SOFTWARE APPLICATIONS TO INCLUDE: THE ORACLE FEDERAL FINANCIALS (OFF) COMMERCIAL OFF-THE-SHELF (COTS)ACCOUNTING SYSTEM WITH CUSTOM EXTENSIONS, THE E-COMMERCE DATA WAREHOUSE (EDW) WITH DATA MARTS, THE CUSTOM-BUILT MANAGEMENT TRACKING AND REPORTING (MTR) AND EXTRANET APPLICATIONS, THE COMMERCIAL-OFF-THE-SHELF (COTS) PRISM APPLICATION, AND THE DOCUMENTUM APPLICATION WITH CUSTOM EXTENSIONS.  THE EOSS CONTRACT WILL PROVIDE: (1) MAINTENANCE OF EXISTING CUSTOM E-COMMERCE SOFTWARE; (2) MAINTENANCE OF EXISTING COTS EXTENSIONS AND CONFIGURATIONS; (3) CORRECTIVE SOFTWARE MAINTENANCE, INCLUDING ALL EFFORTS TO DIAGNOSE AND CORRECT PROCESSING OR PERFORMANCE ERRORS; AND (4) COORDINATION FOR AND TROUBLESHOOTING OF REMOTE DEFENSE INFORMATION SYSTEMS AGENCY (DISA) COMPUTING AND NETWORK INFRASTRUCTURE CAPABILITIES. EOSS CONTRACT PERSONNEL WILL CONDUCT REGULARLY SCHEDULED SOFTWARE ADJUSTMENTS AND INSPECTIONS, UPGRADES AND MAJOR REPAIRS OF APPLICATION COMPONENTS, PREVENTIVE SOFTWARE MAINTENANCE TASKS, REGULARLY SCHEDULED OPERATIONAL TASKS, AND BREAK-FIX EMERGENCY RESPONSE.  IN ADDITION, THE EOSS CONTRACT WILL PROVIDE: (1) MODIFICATIONS TO EXISTING OPERATIONAL CUSTOM SOFTWARE AND COTS EXTENSIONS; (2) EXPANSION OF EXISTING CAPABILITIES TO NEW USERS; AND (3) APPLICATION CHANGES MANDATED BY LAWS AND DIRECTIVES.   FINALLY, THE EOSS CONTRACT WILL ALSO SERVE AS A VEHICLE TO IMPLEMENT E-COMMERCE MODERNIZATION PROJECTS TO INCLUDE DISA INFRASTRUCTURE AND NETWORK PLANNING.   IN CONDUCTING THESE ACTIVITIES, EOSS IT SUPPORT PERSONNEL WILL PERFORM SOFTWARE AND SYSTEMS ENGINEERING, BUSINESS ANALYSIS, SOFTWARE DESIGN, DEVELOPMENT AND INTEGRATION, COTS SOFTWARE CONFIGURATION AND MANAGEMENT, TESTING (INTEGRATION, UNIT, SYSTEM, AND USER ACCEPTANCE), DOCUMENTATION MAINTENANCE, SOFTWARE DEPLOYMENT, SOFTWARE OPERATIONS, AND APPLICATION TRAINING.

Description: THE GLOBAL COMMAND AND CONTROL SYSTEM JOINT IS THE DOD JOINT COMMAND AND CONTROL SYSTEM OF RECORD FOR ACHIEVING FULL SPECTRUM DOMINANCE.  THE GCCSJ SYSTEM IS A SUITE OF MISSION APPLICATIONS THAT PROVIDES CRITICAL JOINT WARFIGHTING C2 CAPABILITIES AND IS THE PRINCIPAL FOUNDATION FOR DOMINANT BATTLESPACE AWARENESS, PROVIDING AN INTEGRATED, NEAR REALTIME PICTURE OF THE BATTLESPACE NECESSARY TO CONDUCT JOINT AND MULTINATIONAL OPERATIONS.  GCCSJ PROVIDES A ROBUST AND SEAMLESS C2 CAPABILITY TO THE COMMANDER IN CHIEF, SECRETARY OF DEFENSE, NATIONAL MILITARY COMMAND CENTER, COMBATANT COMMANDERS, JOINT FORCE COMMANDERS, AND SERVICE COMPONENT COMMANDERS.  GCCSJ OFFERS VITAL CONNECTIVITY TO THE SYSTEMS THE JOINT WARFIGHTER USES TO PLAN, EXECUTE, AND MANAGE MILITARY OPERATIONS.  GCCSJ IS A MAJOR INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY INVESTMENT DESIGNATED AS AN ACQUISITION CATEGORY IAC MAJOR AUTOMATED INFORMATION SYSTEM PROGRAM.  THE GCCSJ PROGRAM MANAGEMENT OFFICE IS TASKED TO SUSTAIN AND MAINTAIN THE CURRENT CAPABILITY ENSURING CONTINUED SUPPORT OF JOINT C2 NEEDS ACROSS THE DOD TO INCLUDE THOSE OF THE GCCS FAMILY OF SYSTEMS.  THE INTENT OF THIS FOLLOW ON REQUIREMENT IS TO SUSTAIN AND MAINTAIN THE EXISTING SYSTEM BASELINES THAT THE PMO IS REQUIRED TO KEEP IN AN OPERATIONAL STATE UNTIL THE SYSTEM IS MODERNIZED.  THIS REQUIREMENT IS TO OBTAIN MISSION CRITICAL ENGINEERING, SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT, AND CYBERSECURITY INFORMATION ASSURANCE SUPPORT FOR THE SUSTAINMENT OF THE EXISTING GCCSJ SYSTEM.  THIS SUPPORT WILL ENABLE GCCSJ TO ACHIEVE STRONGER AND MORE EFFECTIVE SOFTWARE SUSTAINMENT AND MAINTENANCE SERVICES UNDER A SINGLE CONTRACTOR WHO WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR EFFECTIVELY EXECUTING THE ASSOCIATED PROCESSES USING AN AGILE DEVELOPMENT METHODOLOGY.
